notes: v0.4.1 — Build-time secret injection. Source on GitHub now uses placeholders (__INJECT_CF_AIG_TOKEN__ / __INJECT_GEMINI_API_KEY__); build-rbz.sh substitutes them from env vars at release time. Public repo is credential-clean and stops triggering GitHub secret-scanning. Auto-update rb_url switched from raw main to release-asset download URL (versioned per release) — auto-update flow unchanged for installed users, just a different URL it fetches from. No feature changes vs 0.4.0.
